articles.title: See Bruce Springsteen Play With Jon Bon Jovi, Public Enemy at Night Two of ‘Music America’
articles.why: Springsteen sharing a stage with Jon Bon Jovi and Public Enemy at a patriotic concert is the kind of unexpected cultural collision — classic rock royalty meeting hip-hop legends — that only happens at rare live moments. On D-Day anniversary weekend, the timing adds weight.
articles.hook: Bruce Springsteen, Jon Bon Jovi, and Public Enemy all performed together last night, and somehow that sentence is real.

articles.title: Google and FBI warn of ransomware group that sends fake IT workers to hack victims in person
articles.why: A ransomware group sending fake IT workers physically into law firm offices to steal data with USB drives is a genuinely alarming escalation — this isn't a phishing email, it's a physical intrusion operation endorsed by Google and the FBI as an active threat.
articles.hook: The FBI and Google are warning about a ransomware gang that's sending fake IT support workers to physically walk into law firms and steal data with USB drives.

articles.title: Earl Sweatshirt Postpones North American Tour With MIKE
articles.why: Earl Sweatshirt requiring surgery and postponing his North American tour with MIKE is a real disruption for one of underground rap's most anticipated live runs of the year — the timing hits particularly hard given the Navy Blue album just dropped featuring Sweatshirt.
articles.hook: Earl Sweatshirt is heading into surgery, and his entire North American tour with MIKE is now off.

articles.title: Sean Penn “Got To Enjoy” Watching The Oscars While Skipping Ceremony: “Better For My Mental Health”
articles.why: Sean Penn openly saying he skips the Oscars for his mental health — after just winning Best Supporting Actor — is an unusually candid window into celebrity ambivalence toward Hollywood's most self-serious institution.
articles.hook: Sean Penn won an Oscar this year and still skipped the ceremony, saying watching it at home was better for his mental health.

articles.title: See the Cure Unearth Deep Cuts at Primavera Sound Headlining Set
articles.why: The Cure headlining Primavera Sound with their first concert since November 2024 — and unearthing deep cuts — is a meaningful live music moment for one of post-punk's most enduring bands.
articles.hook: The Cure just played their first show in over six months at Primavera, pulling out rarities fans haven't heard live in decades.

articles.title: Trump's latest memo puts 'most advanced AI in the world' into the military's hands
articles.why: A presidential memo placing the most advanced AI systems directly into military hands — with a provision preventing companies from modifying those models without prior approval — is a quiet but consequential governance shift that sits at the intersection of AI, defense, and corporate autonomy.
articles.hook: Trump signed a memo putting America's most advanced AI into military use and barring companies from altering those models without government sign-off first.
